ベッドで１人で目が覚める。寝床から起き上がると、<br>妙に身体が軽く、スッキリ:
He woke up alone in bed. Sitting up, his body felt strangely light and
refreshed, making for a pleasant awakening.
えっと、昨日の夜は何があったんだっけ？<br>確か、昨日は１日中忙しくて……:
Umm, what happened last night? I remember being busy all day
yesterday...
昨晩の記憶が曖昧だった。<br>確か夜にマリナが訪ねてきて――:
His memory of the previous night was hazy. He recalled that Marina
had come to visit him—
コーヒーと朝食を用意したマリナが部屋にやってくる。<br>普段通りの笑顔を振りま:
Marina, who'd prepared coffee and breakfast, entered with her usual
smile. That's right—she gave him the potion last night...
おお、マリナ。もらったポーションのおかげか、<br>今朝はすっかり身体が軽くなっ:
Oh, Marina. Thanks to the potion you gave me, I woke up feeling really
light and refreshed this morning.
おおっ！<br>そうなんですね～、それは良かったですぅ～♪: Oh! Really? That's great to hear... I'm so glad!♪
ポーションを飲んだとこまではハッキリと記憶があるのだが、<br>そこから先は正直:
He clearly remembered up to the point of drinking the potion, but
honestly, his memory from there on was hazy.
マリナのポーションのおかげで助かったよ。<br>あのポーション、また届けてくれな:
Your potion really helped me out. Could you bring me more of that
potion? I'll pay for it.
マリナは急に焦ったような表情を浮かべて動揺している。: Marina suddenly looked flustered and panicked.
えっとぉ～、あのポーションは珍しい品で、なかなか手に入らないんですよ。<br>期:
Umm... that potion's a rare find—hard to come by. It's a limited-time
item! S-so I don't know when I'll get it again...
そうか。そういや限定品って言ってたな。<br>また見つけたら、その時はまた頼むよ:
I see. Yeah, you did say it was a limited item. Well, let me know if you
find it again.
は、はいっ！<br>またマーケットで見つけましたら是非購入してお持ちしますね！:
Y-yes! If I find it at the market, I'll definitely buy it and bring it to
you!
マリナはそう言って朝食をテーブルに置くと、<br>まるで逃げるように司令室から出:
With that, Marina set breakfast on the table and left the command
room as though fleeing.
ふぅ～……危なかったぁ～……。<br>あんな強力なポーション、さすがにもう旦那さ:
*phew*... That was close... I really can't give such a powerful potion
to Honey again...
さ、昨晩なんて、結局続けて７回もシちゃいましたし……。<br>あんなの続けられた:
I-I mean, last night we ended up doing it seven times straight... If that
continued, my body wouldn't hold out...
マリナはそう呟いて、昨晩の激しい夜の営みを思い返し、<br>大きなため息をこぼす:
Marina muttered to herself, recalling the passionate night they had
shared, and let out a long sigh.
ふう～……。<br>で、でも、たまになら……いいかもしれませんね……♡: *phew*... B-but, every now and then... it might be nice...♡
もしまたマーケットであのポーションを見つけたら、こっそり仕入れておこう。<br>:
If she found that potion at the Market again, she'd secretly stock up.
Resolved, Marina headed to the bustling Market today—
